KaTeX 0.17.0 web assets

Source: the katex 0.17.0 npm package (`dist/katex.min.css` and
`dist/fonts/*.woff2`). The CSS keeps KaTeX's rendering rules unchanged; its
font declarations were mechanically reduced to WOFF2 and rewritten to this
directory so Expo can copy the resources from `public/` without processing
CSS resource URLs.

KaTeX is licensed under the MIT License. See LICENSE in this directory.
